The '''Pentastar Alignment Treaty''' was the founding document of the [[Pentastar Alignment]]. It was signed on the [[Reaper (Executor-class)|''Reaper'']] following the end of the [[Pentastar Talks]] by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Ardus Kaine]] and representatives of the [[Velcar Free Commerce Zone]].
